introSection:
Oblivion: The Black Hole is a steel roller coaster located at Gardaland in Castelnuovo del Garda, Veneto, Italy. It opened on 28 March 2015.

This roller coaster is a Dive Coaster model built by Bolliger & Mabillard.

sections.title: Theme
sections.content: The roller coaster is based around a black hole in the ground, which acts as an underground tunnel. Many buildings and theming elements, including a distorted van, can be seen being pulled into the hole.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: The ride is painted entirely white.

fullText:
Oblivion: The Black Hole is a steel roller coaster located at Gardaland in Castelnuovo del Garda, Veneto, Italy. It opened on 28 March 2015.

This roller coaster is a Dive Coaster model built by Bolliger & Mabillard.

The roller coaster is based around a black hole in the ground, which acts as an underground tunnel. Many buildings and theming elements, including a distorted van, can be seen being pulled into the hole.



The ride is painted entirely white.
